mapper.sql: id, role_code, role_name, user_type, description, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.user_type, r.description, r.status, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.is_deleted FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role ( role_code, role_name, user_type, description, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{roleCode}, #{roleName}, #{userType}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_role
update_time = NOW(), role_name = #{roleName}, user_type = #{userType}, description = #{description}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_role SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
